category_sources: source_facts.description says Simple Authentication and Security Layer; official Cyrus documentation describes Cyrus SASL as an implementation of SASL authentication mechanisms.
display_name_sources: Official cyrusimap.org SASL documentation uses the name Cyrus SASL.
docs_sources: Official cyrusimap.org has dedicated Cyrus SASL documentation and installation guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/cyrusimap/cyrus-sasl; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
